nasb.text: Now the one who presented his offering on the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah;

esv.text: He who offered his offering the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah.

cnv.text: 頭一天獻上供物的，是猶大支派的亞米拿達的兒子拿順。

ccb.text: 第一天来献供物的是犹大支派亚米拿达的儿子拿顺。
